allow: Bash(which npm && node --version && npm --version && which npx)

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3001/api/auth/login -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"username":"student","password":"student123"}' && echo "" && curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3001/api/auth/login -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"username":"teacher","password":"wrong"}')
Bash(which pm2 2>/dev/null && pm2 --version || echo "pm2 not installed")
Bash(pm2 restart iot-system 2>&1 && pm2 logs iot-system --lines 10 --nostream 2>&1)

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"username":"student","password":"student123"}' | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('login ok, role=', d['user']['role'], 'token_len=', len\(d['token']\)\)")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/auth/register -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"username":"newstudent1","password":"pass123","role":"student","name":"新同学"}' | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('register ok =', d['success'], 'user=', d.get\('user',{}\).get\('username'\)\)")

Bash(curl -s http://localhost:3000/api/test/questions | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('questions:', len\(d['questions']\), 'types:', set\(q['type'] for q in d['questions']\)\)")
Bash(pm2 restart iot-system 2>&1 && sleep 2 && pm2 logs iot-system --lines 5 --nostream 2>&1)
